name: @reineira-os/operators
description: Reineira operator infrastructure for cross-chain USDC transfers

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --project packages/coordinator/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/operator/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/operator-cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.ci: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
